title: commiphora oblanceolata
intro: Commiphora oblanceolata, also known as the African myrrh, is a plant species belonging to the family Burseraceae, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Commiphora oblanceolata include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Commiphora oblanceolata include its use in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Commiphora oblanceolata include resin extracts and essential oils, often used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
